blockers.description: dlp-agent/src/ipc/pipe3.rs line 193 uses '..' on ClipboardAlert, discarding source_application and destination_application. AuditEvent has no identity fields. APP-05 not fully met.

decisions.decision: Remove spawn_blocking — call resolve_app_identity directly from std::thread
decisions.rationale: spawn_blocking panics outside Tokio context; std::thread is already blocking

decisions.decision: Agent pipe3.rs '..' discards identity — needs gap plan
decisions.rationale: Agent handler predates Phase 25; out of scope for original plans

next_action: Run /gsd-plan-phase 25 --gaps to create gap-closure plan updating dlp-agent/src/ipc/pipe3.rs (line 193) to extract source_application/destination_application and include in AuditEvent
context_notes: All 3 Phase 25 plans committed. UI capture pipeline correct — identity flows through Pipe 3. Gap is agent-side only: pipe3.rs line 193 uses .. to drop identity fields, AuditEvent has no source/dest fields. spawn_blocking panic fixed (commit 6b0fe78).
